ab: Mtduwa ku kmsiyuk pila su hug?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Tduwa o! piya ka ksiyukun su?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Smhungi ku madas pila da, mtduwa ku kmsiyuk pila su hug?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ini ku adas ka yaku uri o!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Smhungi ku madas pila da.mtduwa ku kmsiyuk pila su hug?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Aji ku, ini saku biqi ka knsiyukan su pnlealay na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Mtduwa ku kmsiyuk lukus su hug?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Iq, ngali nanak.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Mtduwa ku kmsiyuk patas su?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Wada mu ksiyukun Ribix da.
en: B: I loaned it to Ribix.

ab: Ksiyukun ta tdruy gakat su hug?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Iq o, kiya ka kiya ni bqani ku saman duri.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Qmuyux da,ini ku adas bubung, ksiyukun ta bubung su hug?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: Wana kingal bi ka bubung mu, pseupu ta bubung da!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Knsiyukan mu sunan ka patas nii, bgay mu sunan da.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Kmqita su patas manu o tduwa su rmngaw knan.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Knuwan ka prihun misu pila?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Ini huya, niqan pila su siida do biqi ku da.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Biqun su knuwan ka pila mu da?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Biqun su saman.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Biqun su knuwan ka patas mu?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Aji misu wada biqan shiga dhug?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Knsiyukan su na Pawan ka ppatas nii hug?
en: A: Did Pawan lend you this pen?

ab: Kiya, knsiyukan mu suni.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Knsiyukan su na Lowking ka ppatas nii hug?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Lowking?

ab: Aji, bnrigan bubu mu ka nii.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Ungat ka cimu da, usa kmsiyuk cicih cimu Suking han.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Suking.

ab: Iq wa, mha ku kmsiyuk.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Sayi mlawa ka Yabung, bqani ku ka pila mu da ksa.
en: B: Go tell Yabung to give me my money back.

ab: Piya pila ka knsiyukan su na?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
